ogTitle: Samford Valley vs Samsonvale: Climate Safety

heading: Samford Valley vs Samsonvale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Samford Valley, Queensland and Samsonvale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Samford Valley and Samsonvale have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Samford Valley or Samsonvale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Samford Valley has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Samsonvale scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Samford Valley scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Samsonvale scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Samford Valley or Samsonvale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Samford Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
